title: Grids, Splits, Ink, Clay & Tours
description: Five live UI drops: scroll-driven sticky grid reveal, asymmetric split-screen storytelling, animated emphasis ink, claymorphic buttons, and a spotlight product tour.

drops.title: Sticky Reveal Grid
drops.description: A pinned 12-tile grid that reveals in staggered columns, zooms open, then locks a title into place as you scroll.
drops.concept: A tall scroll track drives a sticky, full-viewport grid through three choreographed phases — staggered column reveal, a 2x zoom-open, then a title lock-in — using nothing but a scroll listener and CSS transforms mapped to scroll progress.
drops.source: Codrops — "Sticky Grid Scroll: Building a Scroll-Driven Animated Grid"

interaction.mouse: Scroll the page to drive the grid through its reveal, zoom and content phases
interaction.click: Restart button smooth-scrolls back to the top
interaction.touch: Scroll normally on mobile — same phased transforms apply

drops.title: Asymmetric Split Reveal
drops.description: A sticky visual panel whose width and color shift asymmetrically as you scroll through a narrative on the other side.
drops.concept: A classic split-screen gets a scroll-reactive twist: the left panel's width ratio (30/55/68/42%), color and big number all transition per section via IntersectionObserver, turning a static split into a storytelling device.
drops.source: Speckyboy "Asymmetrical Split Screens" roundup + Awwwards "Split Screen Sticky Scrolling"

interaction.mouse: Scroll through the four sections to watch the split ratio and color shift
interaction.click: Use the debug panel's jump menu to teleport to any section
interaction.touch: Scrolling works identically on touch devices

drops.title: Emphasis Ink
drops.description: Pure-CSS text-emphasis marks draw themselves under key words — five styles, tunable color and position, zero images.
drops.concept: The rarely-used text-emphasis-style/-position/-color trio (dot, circle, sesame, triangle, double-circle) gets its marks staggered in via a color transition, turning a one-line CSS property into a kinetic typography moment.

interaction.mouse: Change style/position or click a color swatch to replay the ink animation
interaction.click: Replay button re-triggers the staggered reveal
interaction.touch: All controls are touch-friendly select/tap targets

drops.title: Clay Press
drops.description: Neo-skeuomorphic buttons that physically compress into inset shadow on press and spring back with an elastic bounce.
drops.concept: 2026's tactile UI comeback in miniature: soft dual-shadow 'clay' buttons, an icon toggle, a segmented control and a switch all compress into an inset shadow on pointerdown and spring back past their resting scale on release.

interaction.mouse: Press and hold any button to see it compress; release for the spring bounce
interaction.click: Toggle the heart, switch and segmented control
interaction.touch: Press/release works identically via touch pointer events

drops.title: Guided Tour
drops.description: A spotlight-cutout coachmark walkthrough that steps between live dashboard elements with an animated tooltip.
drops.concept: A fake mini-dashboard gets a 5-step onboarding tour: a dark scrim with a box-shadow spotlight 'hole' animates between target elements while a tooltip card with step dots and Back/Next/Skip controls follows along.
drops.source: Plotline — "How to Use Coachmarks and Spotlight UI in Mobile Apps"

interaction.mouse: Click Start Tour, then Next/Skip to move through the 5 highlighted elements
interaction.click: Restart button in the debug panel replays the tour
